SEARCH
Module com.hack23.cia.model.internal.application.user.impl
Package com.hack23.cia.model.internal.application.data.ministry.impl

Class ViewMinistryDecisionImpact

java.lang.Object
com.hack23.cia.model.internal.application.data.ministry.impl.ViewMinistryDecisionImpact
All Implemented Interfaces:
com.hack23.cia.model.common.api.ModelObject, java.io.Serializable
@Entity(name="ViewMinistryDecisionImpact") public class ViewMinistryDecisionImpact extends java.lang.Object implements com.hack23.cia.model.common.api.ModelObject
The Class ViewMinistryDecisionImpact. JPA Entity for view_ministry_decision_impact database view. Tracks ministry-level proposal success rates and effectiveness, enabling analysis of government policy implementation, coalition stability, and ministry performance across different policy domains. Aggregates proposal outcomes by ministry, committee, decision type, and quarter to provide insights into government effectiveness and policy success patterns.

Intelligence Value: ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ VERY HIGH

  • Government policy effectiveness measurement
  • Coalition stability monitoring via proposal success rates
  • Ministry performance benchmarking and comparison
  • Policy domain success patterns identification
  • Strategic planning and resource allocation insights

Use Cases:

  • Government Performance Scorecards: Track executive branch effectiveness
  • Coalition Health Monitoring: Detect weakening support for government
  • Policy Success Forecasting: Predict proposal outcomes based on patterns
  • Ministry Rankings: Compare effectiveness across departments
  • Opposition Strategy Analysis: Identify vulnerable policy areas
Since:
v1.35 (Decision Intelligence)
Author:
intelligence-operative
See Also:
  • Issue #7920
  • ViewRiksdagenPartyDecisionFlow
  • Core ministry information
  • Serialized Form
